search_document:
User Request: Units in stock by category.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Units in Stock by Category
Type: bar_chart
Description: Visual representation of units in stock categorized by product categories
Title: Total Units in Stock
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of units in stock across all categories
Title: Category Breakdown
Type: pie_chart
Description: Percentage distribution of units in stock by category

sql_queries.title: Units in Stock by Category
sql_queries.description: Visual representation of units in stock categorized by product categories
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, SUM(p.UnitsInStock) AS TotalUnitsInStock FROM Products p JOIN Categories c ON p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName

sql_queries.title: Total Units in Stock
sql_queries.description: Total number of units in stock across all categories
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(UnitsInStock) AS TotalUnitsInStock FROM Products

sql_queries.title: Category Breakdown
sql_queries.description: Percentage distribution of units in stock by category
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, SUM(p.UnitsInStock) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(UnitsInStock) FROM Products) AS PercentageOfTotal FROM Products p JOIN Categories c ON p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName
